case_title: BENISCH BERT C VS WILLIAMSON JOHN A III

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-19-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-03-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BENISCH BERT C AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMSON JOHN A III ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENISCH BERT C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMSON JOHN A III $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO JOHN A. WILLIAMSON III, RETURNED SIGNED.
